title: HeyClaude Skill Submission Factory
author: JSONbored
copyText:
Install:
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/heyclaude-skill-submission-factory.zip -o heyclaude-skill-submission-factory.zip && unzip -o heyclaude-skill-submission-factory.zip -d ./heyclaude-skill-submission-factory

Usage:
Use this skill when creating a portable Agent Skill and submitting it to the HeyClaude skills registry.

Asset:
# Trigger
"Create a portable Agent Skill and prepare a HeyClaude issue-first submission."

# Required output
1) Valid SKILL.md package
2) Platform compatibility table
3) Cursor adapter draft when applicable
4) HeyClaude submission issue fields
detailMarkdown:
# HeyClaude Skill Submission Factory

Create portable Agent Skills, generate platform adapters, validate package metadata, and prepare issue-first HeyClaude submissions.

## Install
```bash
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/heyclaude-skill-submission-factory.zip -o heyclaude-skill-submission-factory.zip && unzip -o heyclaude-skill-submission-factory.zip -d ./heyclaude-skill-submission-factory
```

## Usage
Use this skill when creating a portable Agent Skill and submitting it to the HeyClaude skills registry.
